claim: World models must understand the full range of possibilities and outcomes from a current state and generate the next state based on actions taken, unlike traditional video models which just predict the next frame
actionable: When evaluating video generation models, assess whether they model state transitions and action-conditioned prediction (physics-aware) versus purely next-frame prediction
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: Medal's retroactive clipping approach (recording to memory, then exporting only the last 30 seconds on demand) eliminates user friction compared to traditional video recorders that require explicit start/stop
actionable: For high-volume user-generated content systems, implement memory-buffered recording that exports only on-demand rather than requiring explicit recording sessions
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: Action labels can be derived from visual inputs without logging individual key presses, preserving privacy while providing the training signal needed for world models
actionable: For privacy-preserving action labeling, extract semantic actions from visual overlays (controller positions, keyboard/mouse visual feedback) rather than logging raw input events
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: Vision-based agents trained on game footage via imitation learning can achieve human-like performance without reinforcement learning, inheriting superhuman behaviors from training data that captures peak human gameplay
actionable: For embodied agent training, start with large-scale imitation learning on human demonstrations before applying RL; prioritize diverse, high-quality demo data over algorithmic complexity
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: Game footage provides better training data than YouTube real-world video because games have explicit, ground-truth action labels and avoid the complexity of estimating hidden factors (pose estimation, optical dynamics, camera intrinsics)
actionable: When building spatial-reasoning models, prefer synthetic/game data with ground-truth action labels over real-world video until you can solve pose estimation and inverse dynamics at scale
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: World models can exhibit superhuman behaviors when trained on highlights of peak human performance, not through RL exploration but through imitation learning on exceptional demonstrations
actionable: For imitation-learning agents, explicitly curate and prioritize training data from peak-performance moments rather than uniform coverage of human behavior
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: Compute complexity of simulation scales rapidly with three factors: number of agents, degrees of freedom per agent, and information revealed per action; video-based learning becomes preferable when these scale
actionable: When choosing between learned world models and hand-crafted simulators, estimate the three-factor complexity curve; if any variable is large, world models trained on video are likely more cost-effective
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: LLMs and world models are complementary rather than rivals; LLMs serve as orchestrators managing instances of spatial-temporal agents, while world models provide embodied reasoning
actionable: In systems combining LLMs and world models, architect the LLM as a high-level task planner/orchestrator and world models as low-level embodied controllers rather than replacing one with the other
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: World models trained on video can transfer from games to real-world video and eventually robotics by learning the underlying physics and spatial relationships independent of the visual domain
actionable: Design world models to learn physics and spatial invariants rather than domain-specific patterns; test transfer from synthetic (game) → realistic game → real video → robotics as a progression
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: When evaluating proprietary datasets for sale, don't determine value based on intrinsic properties alone—actually train models with your data and measure resulting capabilities to understand its true value
actionable: Before licensing or selling proprietary training data to labs, build proof-of-concept models internally to understand capability gains; use this as a baseline for valuation and licensing decisions
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: Spatial-temporal foundation models will power 80% of future atoms-to-atoms interactions (physical world AI tasks) across both simulation and robotics, making spatial reasoning the core capability
actionable: If building AI infrastructure companies, prioritize depth in spatial-temporal reasoning over breadth; specialize in the spatial domain to capture high-margin use cases in simulation and robotics
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: Model distillation into tiny versions can work for world models but shows degraded performance on nuanced spatial reasoning; trade-off between parameter count and behavior quality is explicit
actionable: Before distilling world models, measure performance degradation on spatial reasoning benchmarks; use distilled models only where model size/latency constraints outweigh reasoning quality needs
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: A first-principles understanding of ML fundamentals (linear algebra, calculus, neural network architectures, chain rule) is essential for technical founders even if co-founders have deep expertise; gaps in knowledge limit your ability to challenge assumptions
actionable: As a non-ML technical founder, take comprehensive coursework in deep learning fundamentals before scaling your company; prioritize intuition-building over breadth to challenge team assumptions effectively
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI

claim: Focus on a narrow, defensible use case first (code for Anthropic, spatial agents for General Intuition) before expanding; this focus attracts top talent and creates customer relationships that enable scaling
actionable: As an AI product company, identify your highest-conviction use case and become the gold standard there before horizontally expanding; use this wedge to build organizational capabilities and customer trust
source_title: World Models & General Intuition: Khosla's largest bet since LLMs & OpenAI
